form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 7 at Scone Ctry Mdn on March 20 over 1400m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Famahan carrying 58.5kg at $7. Will derive great benefit from that hit-out and looks all set to go one better.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run in a small field at Coffs Harbour Mdn on March 9 over 1412m, on heavy track; 5 len behind Headstream with 58.5kg at $2.50. Before that 3rd of 7 at Beaumont (Newcastle) Ctry Mdn on February 16 over 1350m, 2 len behind Heta with 59kg at $1.90. Consistent sprinter who can win this without surprising.

form.formComment: At the latest run made significant ground from the rear of the field 2nd of 10 at Armidale Mdn on March 29 over 1100m, 4 len behind Diva Rouge carrying 54.5kg at $5. Racing well and is an appealing each-way proposition.
